question.text: A trader sells 10 lots of USDJPY cross-currency futures at 150.65. Settlement price is 149.85. What is the profit in JPY and approximately in INR (JPY/INR = 55.50 per 100 JPY)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Profit = 10 × 1000 × (150.65 - 149.85) = 10,000 × 0.80 = JPY 8,000. INR equivalent = 8,000 × (55.50/100) = INR 4,440. **The Trap:** USDJPY P&L accrues in JPY (quote currency). The lot size is 1000 USD (base), but value is in JPY. **Cross-Exam Context:** Cross-currency futures P&L with INR conversion is unique to Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** All cross-currency futures in India settle in INR — JPY or USD P&L is converted using FBIL rates.
